title: Movie Sheep
description: Changes the Sheep texture to the one from the teaser trailer!
body:
This resource pack changes the sheep texture to the one featured in the Minecraft movie!

You may need optifine to run this, the textures are very big lol
![The sheep can be dyed to every color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e152ab5684bd0d35e6a6b37a881f45ff5a36ee76.png)
